parameters.name: search
parameters.value: search index=zeek sourcetype=zeek_conn | where NOT like(_raw, "#%") | eval fields=split(_raw, "	") | eval src_ip=mvindex(fields,2), dest_ip=mvindex(fields,4), proto=mvindex(fields,6) | where match(dest_ip, "^\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+$") AND NOT like(dest_ip, "192.168.%") AND NOT like(dest_ip, "10.%") AND NOT like(dest_ip, "172.%") AND NOT like(dest_ip, "224.%") AND NOT like(dest_ip, "239.%") AND NOT like(dest_ip, "255.%") AND dest_ip!="0.0.0.0" | dedup dest_ip | table _time, src_ip, dest_ip, proto | sort -_time | head 20
